label: Ritual focus properties
description: Properties for buildings used as the focal point of ideoligion rituals.

spectateDistance.label: Spectate distance
spectateDistance.description: Strict maximum distance in cells within which participants must stand during the ritual.

spectateDistanceLax.label: Spectate distance (lax)
spectateDistanceLax.description: Lenient maximum distance used for the ritual quality bonus calculation.

maxAttachedInterval.label: Max attached interval
maxAttachedInterval.description: Maximum ticks between ritual progress ticks before the ritual is considered abandoned.
